name: Peach
description: Juicy, sweet fruit with a fuzzy skin, perfect for fresh eating or baking.
variety_info: Includes varieties like Freestone and Clingstone.
attributes: Rich in vitamins A and C, delicious and versatile.

name: Grape
description: Sweet, juicy clusters of fruit that can be eaten fresh or used to make wine.
variety_info: Includes table grapes and wine grapes.
attributes: High in antioxidants, great for snacking.

name: Elderberry
description: A flowering shrub known for its dark berries used in syrups and wines.
variety_info: Includes American and European elderberries.
attributes: Rich in vitamins and antioxidants, medicinal properties.

name: Gooseberry
description: Tart berries that can be eaten fresh or used in jams and desserts.
variety_info: Includes green, red, and yellow varieties.
attributes: Rich in vitamin C, high in fiber.

name: Wild Rose
description: Beautiful flowering shrub known for its fragrant blooms.
variety_info: Includes various native species.

name: Juniper
description: Evergreen shrub or small tree, often used for landscaping.
variety_info: Includes species like Eastern red cedar.

name: Rhododendron
description: Large flowering shrub with vibrant blooms, popular in gardens.
variety_info: Includes many hybrids and species.

name: Azalea
description: Flowering shrub known for its stunning blooms, often found in gardens.
variety_info: Includes deciduous and evergreen varieties.

name: Mountain Laurel
description: An evergreen shrub with beautiful clusters of flowers.
variety_info: Native species in the eastern U.S.

name: Elderberry Shrub
description: A shrub known for its clusters of small white flowers and dark berries.
variety_info: Includes several native species.

name: Blueberry Shrub
description: A deciduous shrub that produces delicious blue berries.
variety_info: Includes highbush and lowbush varieties.

name: Manzanita
description: A drought-tolerant shrub with attractive bark and small flowers.
variety_info: Several species available, varying in size and flower color.

name: Sagebrush
description: A resilient shrub native to arid regions with a strong aroma.
variety_info: Commonly found in the western United States.

name: Sumac
description: A shrub known for its vibrant fall color and berry clusters.
variety_info: Includes smooth and staghorn sumac.

name: Gooseberry Shrub
description: A deciduous shrub that produces tart, edible berries.
variety_info: Includes green, red, and yellow varieties.

name: Snowberry
description: A shrub with white berries and attractive foliage.
variety_info: Commonly found in North America.

name: Yucca
description: A drought-resistant plant with sword-like leaves.
variety_info: Includes several species, both ornamental and edible.

name: Pumpkin
description: A large, round fruit commonly used in fall decorations and cooking.
variety_info: Includes pie pumpkins and carving pumpkins.

name: Butternut Squash
description: A sweet, nutty squash used in various dishes.
variety_info: Commonly grown for its sweet flavor.

name: Zucchini
description: A versatile summer squash that is easy to grow.
variety_info: Includes green and yellow varieties.

name: Lettuce
description: Lettuce is a leafy green vegetable known for its crisp texture and mild flavor.
variety_info: Includes varieties like Romaine, Butterhead, and Iceberg.

name: Thimbleberry
description: Thimbleberry is a deciduous shrub known for its sweet, red berries.
variety_info: Native to North America, it grows well in moist, shady areas.

name: Beach Plum
description: Beach Plum is a hardy shrub that produces small, sweet plums.
variety_info: Various cultivars exist, known for their adaptability.

name: Kiwi (Hardy)
description: Hardy Kiwi produces small, grape-sized fruits that are sweet and edible.
variety_info: Includes varieties like Arctic Kiwi.

name: Honeyberry
description: Honeyberry is a cold-hardy shrub that produces sweet, blueberry-like fruits.
variety_info: Includes several cultivars for different climates.

name: Aronia (Chokeberry)
description: Aronia is a hardy shrub bearing small, dark berries that are rich in antioxidants.
variety_info: Includes black, red, and purple varieties.

name: American Hazelnut
description: American Hazelnut is a deciduous tree known for its edible nuts.
variety_info: Includes improved cultivars for nut production.

name: Butternut
description: Butternut is a tree that produces a sweet and buttery nut.
variety_info: Native to eastern North America, with several cultivars.

name: Chestnut
description: Chestnut is a large tree known for its edible nuts and beautiful foliage.
variety_info: Includes American and European chestnut varieties.

name: English Walnut
description: English Walnut is a popular tree known for its flavorful nuts.
variety_info: Includes several cultivars for optimal nut production.

name: Chamomile
description: Chamomile is a gentle herb known for its calming properties, often used in teas.
variety_info: German Chamomile and Roman Chamomile are the two main varieties.

name: Lemongrass
description: Lemongrass is a tropical plant known for its citrus flavor, commonly used in Asian cuisine.
variety_info: Common and West Indian are the primary varieties.

name: Bay Laurel
description: Bay Laurel is an aromatic evergreen tree that produces bay leaves used in cooking.
variety_info: Commonly grown as Laurus nobilis.

name: Lovage
description: Lovage is a perennial herb known for its strong celery-like flavor.
variety_info: Common Lovage is the primary variety.

name: Sorrel
description: Sorrel is a leafy green herb with a tart flavor, often used in salads and soups.
variety_info: Common sorrel and French sorrel are popular varieties.

name: Lemon Balm
description: Lemon Balm is a fragrant herb known for its lemon-scented leaves and calming effects.
variety_info: Common Lemon Balm is the main variety.

name: Fennel (Herb)
description: Fennel is a flavorful herb with feathery leaves and a bulbous base, used in various dishes.
variety_info: Common fennel and bronze fennel are popular varieties.

name: American Holly
description: American Holly is an evergreen tree known for its bright red berries and spiny leaves.
variety_info: Common American Holly or Ilex opaca.

name: Witch Hazel
description: Witch Hazel is a winter-blooming shrub known for its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties.
variety_info: Common Witch Hazel or Hamamelis virginiana.

name: Spicebush
description: Spicebush is a deciduous shrub known for its aromatic leaves and yellow flowers in early spring.
variety_info: Common Spicebush or Lindera benzoin.

name: Buttonbush
description: Buttonbush is a deciduous shrub known for its unique round flower clusters and glossy green leaves.
variety_info: Common variety includes Cephalanthus occidentalis.

name: Ninebark
description: Ninebark is a hardy shrub with distinctive peeling bark and clusters of white to pink flowers.
variety_info: Popular varieties include 'Diablo' and 'Summer Wine'.

name: New Jersey Tea
description: New Jersey Tea is a compact shrub known for its fragrant white flowers and attractive foliage.
variety_info: Variety includes Ceanothus americanus.

name: Inkberry
description: Inkberry is an evergreen shrub with dark green leaves and small black berries.
variety_info: Common variety includes Ilex glabra.

name: American Beautyberry
description: American Beautyberry is known for its stunning clusters of purple berries and attractive foliage.
variety_info: Common variety includes Callicarpa americana.

name: Arrowwood Viburnum
description: Arrowwood Viburnum is a dense shrub with white flowers and attractive fall foliage.
variety_info: Common variety includes Viburnum dentatum.
attributes: Attracts birds, tolerant of wet soils.

name: Wax Myrtle
description: Wax Myrtle is an aromatic evergreen shrub with waxy leaves and blue berries.
variety_info: Common variety includes Myrica cerifera.

name: Red Osier Dogwood
description: Red Osier Dogwood is known for its striking red stems and clusters of white flowers.
variety_info: Common variety includes Cornus sericea.
attributes: Attracts birds, thrives in wet conditions.

name: Winterberry Holly
description: Winterberry Holly is a deciduous holly known for its bright red berries and attractive foliage.
variety_info: Common variety includes Ilex verticillata.

name: Highbush Cranberry (Viburnum)
description: Highbush Cranberry is a large shrub known for its clusters of red berries and vibrant fall color.
variety_info: Common variety includes Viburnum trilobum.
attributes: Attracts wildlife, adaptable to various soils.

name: Bearberry (Kinnikinnick)
description: Bearberry is a low-growing evergreen shrub that produces small, red berries and has leathery leaves.
variety_info: Commonly found in arctic and alpine regions.

name: Chicken of the Woods
description: A vibrant, shelf-like mushroom that grows on the sides of trees and is known for its meaty texture.
variety_info: Commonly found on oak and cherry trees.
attributes: Edible, vibrant color, easy to identify.
treatment_methods: Remove decayed parts, ensure proper growth conditions

name: Maitake
description: Also known as hen of the woods, Maitake mushrooms are prized for their flavor and health benefits.
variety_info: Grows at the base of oak trees.
fruit_size: Clusters of caps up to 12 inches
treatment_methods: Ensure good air circulation, remove decayed parts

name: Reishi
description: Reishi mushrooms are known for their medicinal properties and are often used in herbal remedies.
variety_info: Grows on decaying hardwood trees.

name: Turkey Tail
description: Turkey Tail mushrooms are recognized for their colorful, fan-like shapes and are used for their health benefits.
variety_info: Commonly found on decaying wood.
treatment_methods: Ensure proper moisture, remove decaying wood

name: Shiitake
description: Shiitake mushrooms are highly valued for their rich flavor and are commonly used in Asian cuisine.
variety_info: Grows on hardwood logs.
